ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock trading symbol */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the trading data */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price reached during the trading day */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price reached during the trading day */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of shares traded */,
  "delivery" INTEGER /* Total delivery quantity of shares */,
  "adj_close_price" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price to account for corporate actions */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" TEXT /* Volume-weighted average price of the stock */,
  "bid_price" TEXT /* Highest price a buyer is willing to pay for the stock */,
  "ask_price" TEXT /* Lowest price a seller is willing to accept for the stock */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of trades for the day */,
  "trading_value" TEXT /* Total value of trades for the day */,
  "num_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades executed during the day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., exchange, API provider) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol", "timestamp")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_symbols" (
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock trading symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company listed under this symbol */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the company belongs */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering (IPO) date of the stock */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "sector_code" TEXT /* Code representing the sector */,
  "industry_code" TEXT /* Code representing the industry */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_days" (
  "trading_day" TEXT /* Date of the trading day */,
  "market_status" TEXT /* Status of the market (open/closed) */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the day is a holiday */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Time the market opens on this trading day */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Time the market closes on this trading day */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of trades on this trading day */,
  "trading_value" TEXT /* Total value of trades on this trading day */,
  "num_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades executed on this trading day */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_day")
)
